title: Microplate Reader Workflow
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8bqhsmw

steps.title: Refresh overnight cell culture in LB...
steps.instruction: Refresh overnight cell culture in LB media at 37 °C Preparation of LB Media by NUS iGEM

steps.title: Measure OD 600 of cell culture for desired OD value
steps.instruction: Measure OD 600 of cell culture for desired OD value

steps.title: Load 200 µL of cell samples...
steps.instruction: Load 200 µL of cell samples into three wells of a 96-well plate (triplicates)

steps.title: Induce appropriate volumes of chemical inducers...
steps.instruction: Induce appropriate volumes of chemical inducers (not exceeding 6 µL ) in each well

steps.title: Load the plate (with lid) into...
steps.instruction: Load the plate (with lid) into microplate reader Cytation 5 (Automated microscope; Multi-mode plate reader, BioTek, N.A., https://www.biotek.com/products/cytation.html , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/f8b9495339723100175aa711858d9f685be6fad7d4aece5413e698de5acbb282/bsiu86se.png , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/f8b9495339723100175aa711858d9f685be6fad7d4aece5413e698de5acbb282/bsit86se.png )

steps.title: Start protocol to run continuous measurement...
steps.instruction: Start protocol to run continuous measurement overnight OD 600 (absorbance) protocol: Wavelength: 600nm Measurement interval time: 8min Run time: 18h GFP (fluorescence) protocol: Excitation: 485 +/- 10 Emission: 528 +/- 10 Gain: Extended RFP (fluorescence) protocol: Excitation: 535 +/- 20 Emission: 600 +/- 20 Gain: Extended Luminescence protocol: Gain: 118 Integration time: 1s OD 600 + GFP protocol script: Measurement interval time: 8min Run time: 18h OD 600 + luminescence protocol script: Measurement interval time: 20min Run time: 20h
